title: Senior Teacher - Sri Chaitanya Capital India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Sri Chaitanya Capital India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Sri Chaitanya Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Sri Chaitanya Capital India:
Sri Chaitanya Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sri Chaitanya Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
